test.command: pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/process-effects.test.ts src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/worker.test.ts src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/relay.test.ts src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/durable-delivery.test.ts src/app/api/daemon-event/route.test.ts src/app/api/webhooks/github/route.test.ts src/app/api/internal/cron/scheduled-tasks/route.test.ts src/app/api/internal/cron/dispatch-ack-timeout/route.test.ts

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed pre-existing test failure 'skips CI snapshot metadata when check-runs response is truncated' - updated assertions to expect the actual behavior where truncated responses still produce a snapshot with ciSnapshotSource: 'github_check_runs'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention documentation for daemon-event route testing: auth claims runId must align with envelope runId to avoid 401 mismatch errors. Terminal messages bypass claim logic (go to run_terminal_ignored), while non-terminal messages trigger claim/dedup path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple workers encountered this pattern in m3-fix-daemon-ingress-assertion-regressions and m3-harden-daemon-ingress-idempotency

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the CI snapshot behavior when check-runs are truncated: the code logs a warning and proceeds with fetched runs rather than returning null, producing a snapshot with ciSnapshotSource: 'github_check_runs' even when truncated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Test fix in scrutiny-validator-effect-ingress-atomicity revealed this behavior
